data.title: Keep CLAUDE.md updated as .skogai structure is established
data.description:
As we audit and integrate .skogai directories, [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>) should be updated to reflect:

- [ ] Actual directory purposes (not guesses)
- [ ] Symlink mappings
- [ ] Workflow documentation
- [ ] Any conventions or patterns established

This is ongoing - update as other setup issues are completed.
